transform_rule: join benchmark median and quality status into treatment health input
fallback_rule: use pricing master if benchmark subset unavailable
qa_check_rule: benchmark columns must map to treatment keys

transform_rule: join recommended sell and governance status
qa_check_rule: recommended price and governance must exist where applicable

transform_rule: map stress scenario to treatment risk modifier
qa_check_rule: stress scenario values must be non-negative

transform_rule: aggregate operational KPIs to score inputs
fallback_rule: fall back to available shorter period with low confidence flag
qa_check_rule: score inputs must be within valid ranges

fallback_rule: use neutral market context if unavailable
qa_check_rule: external proxy index should be bounded and standardized

transform_rule: compute rolling performance and variance stability
qa_check_rule: variance and activity fields must be non-negative

transform_rule: adjust fairness when demand is materially compressed
fallback_rule: use neutral fairness modifier if absent
qa_check_rule: market context join must resolve cleanly

fallback_rule: stop build if utilization policy missing
qa_check_rule: policy title and status must be valid

transform_rule: compare internal performance against pricing reference and governance
fallback_rule: use benchmark summary fallback if needed
qa_check_rule: pricing join coverage must be high

transform_rule: detect KPI direction conflicts and tradeoff patterns
fallback_rule: flag low-confidence conflict when sample thin
qa_check_rule: conflict patterns must be from controlled code list

transform_rule: use therapist instability as supporting evidence for conflict patterns
qa_check_rule: consistency band must come from allowed values

fallback_rule: use neutral demand context if absent
qa_check_rule: external index must not be null for mapped periods

transform_rule: roll treatment health into outlet and manager signals
fallback_rule: hold outlet signal if treatment score missing broadly
qa_check_rule: treatment score band must be populated

transform_rule: roll therapist stability into staffing and coaching signals
fallback_rule: use available therapist subset with coverage flag
qa_check_rule: therapist score must be 0 to 100 or null with reason

transform_rule: translate detected conflicts into manager action priorities
fallback_rule: default to no-conflict state if none detected
qa_check_rule: conflict code must exist in allowed code list

transform_rule: add labor and capacity sustainability overlay
fallback_rule: apply low-confidence outlet capacity signal when sparse
qa_check_rule: capacity utilization and staffing metrics must be valid
